---
title: "Lesson 5:  Mean Squared Error, Bias, and Relative Efficiency"
subtitle: "Statistical Estimation for Data Science and AI"
---

::: {.column-margin}
{{< video 01_mean-squared-error-bias-and-relative-efficiency.mp4 >}}

:::

## Reflection

## Invariance, Mean-Squared Error, and Efficiency (Graded Quiz)

## Quiz Graded

<!-- TODO: include lab -->

## Maximum Likelihood Estimation (Programming Assignment)
